headline: Assessing Entergy’s Valuation After The ‘Fair Share Plus’ Grid And Data Center Plan Launch
summary: Why Entergy’s ‘Fair Share Plus’ Plan Matters for Investors Entergy (ETR) recently rolled out its Fair Share Plus regulatory model, a data center cost sharing plan that shifts full direct power costs to large industrial users while targeting US$5b in customer savings over 20 years. The framework has already drawn US$47b in regional investment tied to grid upgrades and renewable energy projects. This is putting a spotlight on how Entergy might fund future infrastructure while managing bill...
